actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour_0 (m_Script guid: 1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d, fileID: 11500000) maps exactly to Fire.cs on this GameObject. This instance has a BoxCollider (non-trigger) and no Rigidbody, so only collider-based interactions are possible. There are no UnityEvents (no m_Calls present) and Fire.cs exposes no public parameterless methods, so no direct method Trigger is possible. To cover behavior, an external system must invoke IWaterInteractable.WaterHit(Vector3) repeatedly (< maxHitInterval of 2s) for >= totalHitTime (5s) while the fire isOn=true, or neighbor fires must drive onNeighbors to threshold and allow shouldTurnOn to start. We need the m_PrefabInstance fileID for precise addressing and the IDs of neighbor fires or a water emitter that calls WaterHit.
